records.ety: [L. decoratus, p. p. of decorare, fr. decus ornament; akin to decere to be becoming. See Decent.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Decorated (dk"*rā`td); p. pr. & vb. n. Decorating (dk"*rā`tng).]

defs: To deck with that which is becoming, ornamental, or honorary; to adorn; to beautify; to embellish; as, to decorate the person; to decorate an edifice; to decorate a lawn with flowers; to decorate the mind with moral beauties; to decorate a hero with honors.
quotes: Her fat neck was ornamented with jewels, rich bracelets decorated her arms.
